description_long: This is a classic, vintage-style three-seater sofa with a dark brown, tufted leather upholstery. The backrest features deep diamond button tufting, giving it a luxurious and traditional appearance. The seat consists of three individual, thickly padded cushions, while the armrests are wide, rounded, and generously cushioned for comfort. The frame and legs are made of dark wood, with ornate, curved cabriole legs that add an elegant touch. The back of the sofa is smoothly finished in wood, with a gentle wave along the top edge. This piece exudes a sense of sophistication and would be well-suited for upscale urban interiors, lobbies, or stylish public spaces.
description: A vintage-style, dark brown leather sofa with tufted backrest, three padded seat cushions, and ornate wooden legs. The design is elegant and traditional, with wide, cushioned armrests and a smooth wooden back.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick seat cushion, padded armrest, and ornate wooden leg profile.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three seat cushions, diamond-tufted backrest, and both wide armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and leg details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the smooth, dark wooden back with a gently curved top edge and no visible tufting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, thick seat cushions and a single continuous backrest with deep diamond tufting; all cushions appear attached and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, rounded, and padded armrests at both ends, slightly lower than the backrest, with a classic rolled profile and matching leather upholstery.
attribute_leg_design: Four ornate, cabriole-style wooden legs positioned at the corners, featuring a dark finish and curved, decorative shapes.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with a gently curved top edge and deep diamond button tufting, providing a plush and traditional look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Dark brown leather upholstery with a diamond-tufted pattern on the backrest and smooth, slightly textured seat and arm surfaces.
